    "About": [
      "それは、共和国の市民が持つべき、または持つべきであるべき中核的価値観に関するものです。"
    ],
    "Affects": [
      "それはアメリカ合衆国の憲法と歴史に影響を与えます。"
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それは古代ギリシャ・ローマ、ルネサンス、イギリスのモデルとアイデアに関連しています。",
      "それは建国の父たちの著作に関連しています。",
      "それはアメリカ独立革命に関連しています。",
      "それはアメリカ独立宣言に関連しています。",
      "それはアメリカ合衆国憲法に関連しています。",
      "それは権利章典に関連しています。",
      "それはゲティスバーグ演説に関連しています。",
      "それは誠実な政府に関連しています。",
      "それは民主主義に関連しています。",
      "それは個人主義に関連しています。"
    ],
    "BelongsTo": [
      "それは共和国の中核的価値観に属します。"

    ],
    "ComposedBy": [

      "それは、すべての法的主権の源泉としての人民の主権を認識することから成ります。",
      "それは君主制、貴族制、世襲政治権力を拒否することから成ります。",
      "それは市民的義務の遂行における徳と忠実さから成ります。",
      "それは腐敗に対する不寛容から成ります。"
    ],

      "それは市民的・愛国的理想を持っています。",
      "それは政治的イデオロギーを持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは徳と愛国心によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは腐敗と強欲を制限することによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは市民と代表者にとっての徳の重要性によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは贅沢を避ける必要性によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは腐敗を抵抗し根絶するというコミットメントによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは共和国の神聖さによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは真に代表的な方法で国家に奉仕する必要性によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは共通善のために自身の利益を放棄する意思によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは権力者の効果的な抑制を維持する能力によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは人民の警戒心と道徳的持久力によって特徴づけられます。"
    ],
    "HeldIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "HeldOn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "それはアメリカ独立革命に影響を与えました。",
      "それはアメリカ独立宣言に影響を与えました。",

      "それはホイッグ党の政治哲学の影響を受けました。",
      "それはイギリスのトーリー党批評家から影響を受けました。",
      "それはホイッグ党の規範の影響を受けました。",
      "それは新ハ रिंगトニアンの影響を受けました。",
      "それはジョン・ミルトンの影響を受けました。",
      "それはジェームズ・ハリントンの影響を受けました。"

    "InventedBy": [

    "InventedIn": [
      "不明"

    "IsA": [
      "それは価値観と理想のセットです。",
      "それは政治的イデオロギーです。",
      "それは独特の政治的意識です。",
      "それは概念的な転換です。"

      "それは植民地アメリカでは「リパブリカニズム」として知られています。",
      "それはジェファーソン共和党として知られています。",

      "それはその中心的な価値観で知られています。",

    ],

    ],
    "PartOf": [
      "それはアメリカ合衆国憲法の一部です。",
      "それはアメリカ合衆国の歴史の一部です。",
      "それはアメリカ独立革命の知的基盤の一部です。",
      "それは「カントリー・パーティー」の政治的イデオロギーの一部です。",
      "それはホイッグ党の規範の一部です。",
      "それは新ハリングトニアンの伝統の一部です。",
      "それはローマの遺産に由来する古典的共和主義の一部です。",

      "それは腐敗を抵抗し根絶するために使用されます。",
      "それは真に代表的な方法で国家に奉仕するために使用されます。",
      "それは共通善のために自身の利益を放棄するために使用されます。",
      "それは権力者の効果的な抑制を維持するために使用されます。",

About: It is about the core values that citizenry in a republic have, or ought to have.
Affects: It affects the constitution and history of the United States.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Ancient Greco-Roman, Renaissance, and English models and ideas.
It is associated with the writings of the Founding Fathers.
It is associated with the American Revolution.
It is associated with the Declaration of Independence.
It is associated with the Constitution.
It is associated with the Bill of Rights.
It is associated with the Gettysburg Address.
It is associated with honest government.
It is associated with democracy.
It is associated with individualism.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the core values of a republic.
ConsistsOf: It consists of liberty and inalienable individual rights.
It consists of recognizing the sovereignty of the people as the source of all authority in law.
It consists of rejecting monarchy, aristocracy, and hereditary political power.
It consists of virtue and faithfulness in the performance of civic duties.
It consists of intolerance of corruption.
HasA: It has a civic and patriot ideal.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by virtue and patriotism.
It is characterized by limiting corruption and greed.
It is characterized by the importance of virtue for citizens and representatives.
It is characterized by the need to avoid luxury.
It is characterized by a commitment to resist and eradicate corruption.
It is characterized by the sacredness of the republic.
It is characterized by the necessity to serve the state in a truly representative way.
It is characterized by the willingness to give up own interests for a common good.
It is characterized by the ability of the people to maintain effective checks on wielders of power.
It is characterized by the vigilance and moral stamina of the people.
Influenced: It influenced the Declaration of Independence.
It influenced the Bill of Rights.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the "country party".
It was influenced by the classical republicanism of Roman heritage.
It was influenced by ancient Greek city-state examples.
It was influenced by Roman republican examples.
It was influenced by the political philosophy of Whiggism.
It was influenced by Tory critics in England.
It was influenced by the Whig canon.
It was influenced by the neo-Harringtonians.
It was influenced by John Milton.
It was influenced by James Harrington.
IsA: It is a set of values and ideals.
It is a distinctive political consciousness.
KnownAs: It is known as "republicanism" in colonial America.
It is known as the Jeffersonian Republican Party.
It is known as the Democratic-Republican Party.
KnownFor: It is known for its foundational role in the constitution and history of the United States.
It is known for its central values.
It is known for its emphasis on virtue and patriotism.
It is known for its opposition to corruption and greed.
It is known for its role in the American Revolution.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Revolutionary era.
OccurredIn: It occurred in colonial America by 1775.
PartOf: It is part of the constitution of the United States.
It is part of the history of the United States.
It is part of the intellectual basis for the American Revolution.
It is part of the political ideology of the "country party".
It is part of the Whig canon.
It is part of the neo-Harringtonian tradition.
It is part of the classical republicanism of Roman heritage.
It is part of the political philosophy of Whiggism.
It is part of the rhetoric of New England patriot clergy.
It is part of the blend of Christian and republican ideology.
UsedFor: It is used for limiting corruption and greed.
It is used for resisting and eradicating corruption.
It is used for serving the state in a truly representative way.
It is used for giving up own interests for a common good.
It is used for maintaining effective checks on wielders of power.
It is used for challenging corruption and greed in government.
It is used for stirring up a martial spirit.
It is used for justifying war against England.
It is used for encouraging heavy enlistment.
It is used for creating the intellectual climate needed to fight a civil war.
UsedIn: It is used in the United States.
It is used in the context of the United States constitution.
It is used in the history of the United States.
It is used in the American Revolution.
It is used in the Declaration of Independence.
It is used in the Constitution.
It is used in the Bill of Rights.
It is used in the Gettysburg Address.
It is used in the "country party" philosophy.
It is used in colonial America.
UsedTo: It is used to reject monarchy.
It is used to reject aristocracy.
It is used to reject hereditary political power.
It is used to perform civic duties.
It is used to protect liberty.
It is used to challenge the corruption and greed in government.
It is used to justify war against England.
It is used to behave morally and in a "manly" disciplined fashion.
It is used to embrace the concept of republican virtue.
It is used to assert republican virtue.
